entry.title: Re: BTE for parked document
entry.content:
Please correct the 'I post a parked document ' with 'I park a document'

  • Execute a trace or debug, AFAIK Those BTE are not intended to change document values, document number is already defined, and update task FM registered.
  • 'This is the SAP Standard system behavior which will not be changed.' for substitution in parking document seems also valid for BTE

entry.title: Re: Batch managing in SAP B1
entry.content:
Hi @MarinaLevy ,

You have to enable (mark as visible) the related columns at Form Settings when on the report.

If these are not appearing to you, it might be due to the SAP version. I'm using the latest one (2502).

BR,
Felipe

entry.title: Re: How can I as a business owner buy an SAP Learning sub...
entry.content:
Hi @fvdlangenberg1 
Please be assured that I am proactive in the problem-solving process and will do whatever I can to offer a quick sustainable solution that fixes the problem, so that your employee can proceed with your learnings.
The assigned agent will contact you.
Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Re: EWM Outbound delivery - how to update a custom status...
entry.content:
Hi @Jelena_Perfiljeva ,

Please go through the document below...hope you are in correct software version

How to Access “Delivery – Warehouse Request” Objects in EWM in SAP S/4HANA Access Layers and APIs Including Coding Examples SAP S/4HANA 1709 and higher

https://d.dam.sap.com/a/KTtZ3az/How%20To%20Access%20Delivery%20Objects%20in%20S4H.pdf?rc=10

/SCWM/IF_API_WHR_OUTBOUND method: SET_HEADER_STATUS ( Since you are added status in header so need to change value into header status) 

"Question: is it possible to set the value (e.g. active/inactive) of such custom status programmatically? We have an interface with 3rd party system where we'd like to change the status value to manage outbound delivery in a very specific scenario.

In that link, SAP is already provided the codes with example  for EWM outbound delivery and use that method SET_HEADER_STATUS to set value activate or deactivate.

Please let us know if any questions.

Kind Regards,

Ajit

entry.title: Re: Who offers expert health and safety assignment help f...
entry.content:
Hello @CMIA 

 

I believe you're located in the UK? If that's the case start with the The Health and Safety Executive (HSE: Information about health and safety at work). This is the regulating body for this subject. There you'll find a trove of information, both legal and "best practices". 

In a similar fashion, consult both EU OSHA and other "OSHAS" like the Canadian or the Australian - as things are in turmoil over the USA, you should maybe avoid sources there.

Some workers unions and industry unions sites provide useful information about HSE. 

Hope this helps

Paulo Pinto

entry.title: Error during compilation of odata proxy
entry.content:
Hello,

I'm following the course https://learning.sap.com/courses/building-apps-with-the-abap-restful-application-programming-model and I'm stuck in week 5, unit 2.

I keep getting the error 

"Error during compilation of '$OPROXY_SRVD#ZSC_RAP_AGENCY_1848'."

The error is thrown from the following code:

    DATA service_consumption_name TYPE cl_web_odata_client_factory=>ty_service_definition_name.

    DATA(http_destination) = cl_http_destination_provider=>create_by_url( i_url = 'https://sapes5.sapdevcenter.com' ).
    http_client = cl_web_http_client_manager=>create_by_http_destination( i_destination = http_destination ).

    service_consumption_name = to_upper( 'ZSC_RAP_AGENCY_1848' ).

    odata_client_proxy = cl_web_odata_client_factory=>create_v2_remote_proxy(
      EXPORTING
        iv_service_definition_name = service_consumption_name
        io_http_client             = http_client
        iv_relative_service_root   = '/sap/opu/odata/sap/ZAGENCYCDS_SRV/' ).

My service consumption model is generated from the metadata on https://sapes5.sapdevcenter.com/sap/opu/odata/sap/ZAGENCYCDS_SRV/, so everything should fit together.

What could be the problem?

PS: Feel free to look in the code in the Abap Trial Platfrom.

Best Regards,

Martin

entry.title: Re: Why quantities in Chart in SAP IBP Excel Add-In are s...
entry.content:
The reason is that, the chart uses the chart functionality of MS Excel. And there are many settings one can choose in these charts.

In this sense, you will see a quantity 1,582 displayed in full as 1,582 in the chart of Best Practices template DP 140 Global Demand Plan:

However, if we look at the same values, on the same aggregation level (time and Master Data attributes), in the chart of Best Practices template  DP 110 Historical Data Cleanse:

Compare the values above the column charts in the 2 screenshots above.

The reason of the difference is not a difference in the width of the columns in our Excel Sheets, nor is it because of any settings in 'Edit View' > 'View Formats' (which opens the hidden sheet 'IBPFormattingSheet'). Instead, the reason is to be found within the options of the charts in either templates. The relevant 'Chart Design' options can be easily inspected and/or changed, by clicking on the numbers in the chart, selecting them as such:


Subsequently right-click, and choose 'Format Data Label...':

In the first case, we note that the 'Number' > Category' is defined as 'Number' in the following manner:

But if we execute the same process for the second template, we see a different setting:

Right-click on the selected Data Label, and choose 'Format Data Label...':

We notice that the 'Number' > Category' is defined not as 'Number' here but instead as 'Custom' and in the following manner:

[>=1000000]0,,"M";[>=1000]0,"K";#""

And this is the reason for the difference. This is a custom number format used in Excel to display large numbers in a more readable way. It can be understood as such:

  • [>=1000000]0,,"M": If the number is greater than or equal to 1,000,000, it will be displayed in millions (M). For example, 2,500,000 will be shown as 2.5M.
  • [>=1000]0,"K": If the number is greater than or equal to 1,000 but less than 1,000,000, it will be displayed in thousands (K). For example, 1,582 will be shown 2K since the number would be divided by 1,000 and rounded to the nearest whole number.
  • #: This is the default format for numbers that don't meet the previous conditions. It will display the number as is.

I posted this Q&A to be of help to the wider SAP IBP the community. Note that, once understood that the SAP IBP Excel Add-In Chart is using the functionalities of the Microsoft Excel 'Chart Design', one can start to experiment with a whole variety of different chart types, for example by right-clicking on the chart and choosing 'Change Series Chart Type...'.

entry.title: Starter System - Outbound Communication not Possible
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

Lately, I've been trying to send an XML to a specific endpoint when creating a Purchase Order. There is a process called 2EJ and an API, SAP_COM_0224, that covers this process.

However, when attempting to communicate with the Integration Suite, the message never seems to reach it. Even though S/4HANA reports the communication as successful, there's no error message and nothing is received on the other end.

Is the S/4HANA Public Cloud Starter System capable of performing outbound communication at all?

Kind regards,
Philipp

entry.title: My blog does not get posted since 3 weeks
entry.content:
I have written a blog and it is submitted for review since 3 weeks.When will it be posted?

I have made myself familiar with the respective blog posting rules, it is even reviewed by my UA,

best regards,

Michael

entry.title: Re: Responsibility Management: Creating custom teams & responsibility definitions in S/4HANA 202
entry.content:
hi @WilliamChi : There is no documentation if this app is deprecated. I suspect 2 things here

1. Your app is referring to a old catalog which is no longer valid. This can happen when you have upgraded from a lower version to a new version.

2. You don't have sufficient authorization to create a new team category, you can check in SU53 trace and see if you are getting authorization error. You can also ask your security team to check by running ST01 authorization trace for your ID.

 

Regards

Anirban

entry.title: Purchase Order creation directly from Sales Document
entry.content:
Hello there dear community, 

 

In sap s/4 hana public cloud I would like to create a purchase order directly from a sales order 1:1. Ideally, the purchase order also has a reference to the sales order. Is this possible in s/4 hana public cloud?

Stock should be ignored in the Process. 

kind regards, 

Philipp

entry.title: Re: S4Cloud: Adobe Form - custom field hardcoded text not...
entry.content: Hi Jennifer - I am working with Adobe Lifecycle Designer. After editing, I save and upload the reworked template back to S4Hana Cloud and test. My text field is indeed shown when the condition of finding the Payer is met, and the field is inactive when this condition is not met. So the field logic seems to function as expected. The field length is enough, it's 20 characters. I have also tried making the border of the field visible so I can confirm that not only the caption, but also the rest of the field is displayed. I confirm this is the case. It all displayes as one big field and not two fields (1 caption, 1 value), but I believe this is correct. It's identical with the properties of the other surrounding fields which work fine. So, does your work confirm that it's not the javascript that causes this?

entry.title: Re: Responsibility Management: Creating custom teams & responsibility definitions in S/4HANA 202
entry.content:
Hi @0012anirban 

I resolved the issues related to F6616 - Manage Team Categories app. After some OData activation, the app now has a Create button. Thank you.

entry.title: General Availability of Data Space Integration, a capability of SAP Integration Suite
entry.content:
I am delighted to announce the General Availability of 'Data Space Integration', a capability of SAP Integration Suite 

What Is Data Space Integration?

To meet the challenges of the automotive industry, like high costs and complexity in recall campaigns, or the disruptive effects on supply chains of global crisis like the Covid pandemic, and to enable new use cases like exchanging of carbon emissions amongst business partners to foster sustainability, Catena-X was founded in 2021 by the German government and 28 automotive industry partners. Today the Catena-X data space contains several hundred partners and forms a collaborative eco system that enables a secure and self-sovereign data exchange along the whole value chain.
To participate in this data space, each participant needs a connector. A connector consists of a set of standardized APIs allowing data space participants to provide and consume data within this data space, in a self-sovereign manner. SAP's offering for this connector is Data Space Integration as part of SAP Integration Suite. Via Data Space Integration, SAP customers can discover and negotiate offers of business partners and create own offers to enable the exchange of vital business data without giving away the control of their data. Data Space Integration supports all Catena-X business solutions of SAP and is of course certified for Catena-X.

What can I do with Data Space Integration?

After a guided and intuitive onboarding of Data Space Integration to the Catena-X landscape and the preparation of your data plane, which is in our case an integration flow on Cloud Integration, another capability of SAP Integration Suite, your Data Space Integration connector is ready to participate in the data space. One can participate in the data space by providing data to connected business partners or consuming data from connected business partners.
As a provider, you can register assets that you want to share. You can create access and usage policies, to control who will get access to your data and what are these partners allowed to do with the data. Once you have created those 3 items and bind them to one contract definition, your offer will be visible to the allowed partners.

As a consumer, you can discover the data offerings of other business partners through their catalog, pick a suitable offer and start the negotiation. Once both parties agree on the conditions, you get access to the offered asset and can consume it in your business application. As SAP's business applications are directly integrated with Data Space Integration, all those activities happen seamlessly.

Another key feature of Data Space Integration is the company policy. Data sovereignty does not only imply that you keep in control of your data as a sharing member, but also that you only accept those offers that suit you. With company policies a business admin can control, which offers the company is allowed to consume.

Who can use Data Space Integration?

All existing and new SAP Integration Suite customers with Standard and Premium Edition, BTP Enterprise Agreement and Pay-As-You-Go can enable Data Space Integration in the Integration Suite tenant. The SAP Note 3518230 contains all regional availability information. Visit the Discovery Center for all further license details for SAP Integration Suite.

Kindly stay up-to-date and visit the SAP Integration Suite Roadmap.

entry.title: Re: Xsteps in Process order. How to add custom logic to s...
entry.content:
going to close the topic, as there were no further replies .. 

Will add some details based on my investigations.

The main methods to to be used could be using interface 'IF_EX_WORKORDER_EXEC_STEPS' (class CL_IM_COCR_CMX_BI_XSTEPS).

Method 'Generate Control Recipe' allows to 'step in' during Control Recipe generation from where FM CONTROL_RECIPE_CREATE is triggered.

Its possible to manipulate both control recipe pre-filled tables (available in include ICMXCRIMP02), or its possible to manipulate data in the object 'root' which gives the full tree of Process order related Xstep. 

The root object is also available in the same include (ICMXCRIMP02).

ROOT consists of string classes in a tree form. The way to find needed data is to step top->down direction through M_PERSISTENT_CHILDS table available under LCL_CMX_XS_PERSISTENT class. Each line in M_PERSISTENT_CHILDS represents sub node in Xstep. Its possible to match nodes via OID (GUID ids from Xstep tree within Process order). At certain stage M_PARAM_LOADED = ‘X’ will tell you that you're in the STEP where params and valuation takes place. The list of params with those values will be available in M_PARAM_LOADED_BUFFER. 

It is possible to manipulate data in those table under LCL_CMX_XS_PERSISTENT  (edit, create, delete lines), which will affect the context of XSTEP in PO as well as context for Control Recipe, etc..

entry.title: Re: Duplicate run of integration flow consuming event fro...
entry.content: Thanks @ajmaradiaga again for helping out. Changing the AMQP sender adapter to queue instead of topic resolved the issue 2. Regarding issue 1 of duplicate runs of the iFlows, I realized two worker nodes are running as the screenshot shows 2 different instance ids for the runs in MPL. I thought one worker node should stop processing the message once it realizes another worker node is already processing it as mentioned in this note. However this note (https://me.sap.com/notes/2582931/E) talks about integration triggered using a timer, is it not applicable to integration processes triggered by AMQP sender adapter?

entry.title: Re: Purchase Order creation directly from Sales Document
entry.content:
Hi @Phil_P ,

Have you explored SAP Best Practice scenarios for this flow? Relevant items can be Sales of Non-Stock Item with Order-Specific Procurement or Sales Processing using Third-Party with Shipping Notification, depending if you post the goods receipt in your plant, or if an external supplier delivers goods directly to the customer. More scenarios are available here - Third-Party Order Processing.

Best regards

entry.title: Re: Step by Step Implementation of Secure Login Service for SAP GUI - BTP SSO
entry.content: Hi @sajaysurya7 If a customer already has a fully functioning on-premise Active Directory KDC setup that's successfully handling Kerberos SSO for SAP GUI, there's typically no technical need to implement BTP Secure Login Service (SLS) for the same functionality.

entry.title: Re: Remove data inconsistency in Release status caused while Purchase Order / Purchase Requisition w
entry.content:
Case 2 occurs in our productive system multiple times per week. Especially with purchase orders related to embedded TMS.

This blog was proposed as solution for the OSS call Case 217900/2025 - Purchasing document processing state in release with no active workflow instance - SAP For Me.

For us this is not a proper solution as the users always have to create a ticket and they only recognize this issue once the follow-up document should be posted.

Currently we are not changing EKKO-PROCSTAT via debugger but re-trigger the workflow:

Transaction SWUE

Object Category CL ABAP Class

Object Type CL_MM_PUR_WF_OBJECT_PO

Event SUBMITTED_FOR_APPROVAL

Object Key [Purchase Order Document Number]

-> Create Event

 

Please @Sivangi, try to find out the root cause of these issues and provide a proper solution.

 

BR

Tom

entry.title: Need CDS view for customer Project Actual cost and Billed & Unbilled information in SAP Public cloud
entry.content:
Hi,

I'm creating a CDS view for the customer project overview.

I need CDS view information to link the fields mentioned below. Some of these fields are available in the CUBE-related CDS view, but I couldn't use them in the "Custom CDS View" app.

Field Name
1. Actual Effort (Hours)
2. Actual Cost
3. Billed
4. Unbilled
5. Billing Method

Thanks & Regards,
Vignesh T

entry.title: Re: Xstep. How to get context of XSTEP Tree via ABAP tool...
entry.content:
going to close the topic as there were no replies received. 

there are 2 ways to get the data from xstep: 

1) physical DB tables: 

  • Root level :COCR_CMX_DB_CR , CMX_XS_DB_ROOT, 
  • Context data: COCR_CMX_DB_CS, CMX_XS_DB_STEP
  • References (SXS) CMX_XS_DB_REF.
  • Parameter values: CMX_XS_DB_VS
  • Table that links high level with lower levels: CMX_XS_DB_NREL.

2) ROOT object available in various XSTEP related actions (method, etc). For example in ICMXCRIMP02 from where Control Recipe generation is triggered. 

ROOT consists of string classes in a tree form. The way to find needed data is to step top->down direction through M_PERSISTENT_CHILDS table available under LCL_CMX_XS_PERSISTENT class. Each line in M_PERSISTENT_CHILDS represents sub node in Xstep. Its possible to match nodes via OID (GUID ids from Xstep tree within Process order). At certain stage M_PARAM_LOADED = ‘X’ will tell you that you're in the STEP where params and valuation takes place. The list of params with those values will be available in M_PARAM_LOADED_BUFFER.

entry.title: Re: SAC Data Point Comments in Comment Column not transfe...

entry.title: Re: FSCM CM: How transaction date in SD objects
entry.content: In general, Sales order date (fqm_flow-transaction date) should be Billing date plus Payment term days. Here, the payment history for cash discount payments is also taken into account. See Note 24883 - CMF: Determination of value/planning date

entry.title: Re: How to create custom API for Talent Intelligence Hub data to integrate with downstream system(s)

I guess we can use the Integration Center in SuccessFactrors too whithout having the customers pay for addition product. Can you please confirm if we can create the descripted flow vie Integration Center in SF?

entry.title: Re: Switching ALV on a dynpro container -> old ALV remain...

entry.title: error in SFTP receiver channel in SAP 7.50
entry.content:
Hi Team,

My scenario is IDOC to SFTP and authentication is Password authentication.

while sending the data to Target system i am getting the following error.

Transmitting the message to endpoint <local> using connection AFW failed, due to: com.sap.engine.interfaces.messaging.api.exception.MessagingException: javax.resource.ResourceException: java.lang.UnsupportedOperationException: received authentication request from server which could not be processed: destination=user@hostname; name=Password authentication; instruction=prompt=users password

Here user = sftp connecting user

hostname = target host (SFTP SERVER)

 

Please help why i am getting the above error in receiver SFTP channel?

Regards,
Ravi

entry.title: Re: Business event for MCP
entry.content: Hello, Please give more details so we can help you ?

entry.title: Email notifications for the buyer when a Goods Receipt (GR) or Service Entry Sheet (SES) is created
entry.content:
Hey Community,

 

 

I am facing an issue in configuring email notifications for the buyer when a Goods Receipt (GR) or Service Entry Sheet (SES) is created for a Purchase Order (PO). Below is a detailed explanation of the steps I have taken so far:

 

  1. I successfully tested sending notifications through the SAP GUI using transaction code SBWP, and it worked as expected.
  2. To enable email notifications to the buyer, I configured the output type on MLGR to "7 (External Mail)" instead of "5 (Simple Mail)".
  3. I also set up a communication condition type through MN21 for MLGR and adjusted it to "7 (External Mail)".

 

However, at this point, I am unsure what values to specify in the communication settings for the notification to be sent automatically to the buyer's registered email address in the system.

I would appreciate it if you could provide step-by-step guidance on how to:

 

  • Properly configure the email notifications.
  • Ensure that the communication settings are correctly set up for this purpose.
  • Verify that the configuration works as intended.

entry.title: Re: Edit journal entry when processor approval Verify Gen...
entry.content:
Hello dear user,

Thank you for sharing the screenshot. Based on what I see, you are in the correct place, editing a step in the flexible workflow for general journal entries. However, the "Allow changes to journal entry" checkbox is only available under certain conditions.

Here’s how to make it appear:

  1. Go to “Manage Workflows for General Journal Entry Verification”
  2. Select your workflow, then edit the step (the one assigned to the processor).
  3. In the “Recipients” tab, ensure the step is assigned to a user or role like SAP_BR_GeneralLedgerAccountant.
  4. Then switch to the “Step Conditions” tab.
  5. Scroll down and look for the section “Step Settings” — that’s where the "Allow changes to journal entry" checkbox should appear.

I hope this will help you answer your questions.

Best regards,

Jeremy

entry.title: Re: S4Cloud: Adobe Form - custom field hardcoded text not...
entry.content:
Hi Katja, good question.. I made a little Adobe form with just one textfield and the assignement via Javascript.. that works fine for me:

 

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<?xfa generator="AdobeLiveCycleDesigner_V11.0.9.20230422.1.42_SAP" APIVersion="3.6.23111.0"?>
<xdp:xdp xmlns:xdp="http://ns.adobe.com/xdp/" timeStamp="2025-04-23T07:31:33Z" uuid="624e300a-56fe-4812-bfb9-020e615f49ec">
<template xmlns:xliff="urn:oasis:names:tc:xliff:document:1.1" xmlns="http://www.xfa.org/schema/xfa-template/3.3/">
<?formServer defaultPDFRenderFormat acrobat10.0dynamic?>
<subform layout="tb" locale="de_DE" name="data" restoreState="auto">
<pageSet>
<pageArea id="Page1" name="Seite1">
<contentArea h="284.3mm" w="197.3mm" x="0.25in" y="0.25in"/>
<medium long="297mm" short="210mm" stock="a4"/>
<?templateDesigner expand 1?></pageArea>
<?templateDesigner expand 1?></pageSet>
<subform h="284.3mm" w="197.3mm">
<field h="9mm" name="Test" w="62mm" x="57.15mm" y="79.375mm">
<ui>
<textEdit>
<border>
<edge stroke="lowered"/>
</border>
<margin/>
</textEdit>
</ui>
<font typeface="Arial"/>
<margin bottomInset="1mm" leftInset="1mm" rightInset="1mm" topInset="1mm"/>
<para vAlign="middle"/>
<caption reserve="18.0838mm">
<para vAlign="middle"/>
<value>
<text xliff:rid="7175D1FB-772F-4459-94CD-FD4DAE9583F4">Textfeld</text>
</value>
</caption>
<bind match="none"/>
<event activity="initialize" name="event__initialize">
<script contentType="application/x-javascript">this.rawValue = "TEST";

</script>
</event>
</field>
<?templateDesigner expand 1?></subform>
<proto/>

entry.title: Re: Team goal for terminated Managers - how to manager those team goals after manager leave.
entry.content:
Hi, 

has anyone found a solution to this problem in the meantime? 
In our process, the situation has worsened with the current release (1HJ2025).  Previously, our process was designed so that managers should share the goal before their inactivity. Since the current release, it is no longer possible to share team goals without all managers being authorized to see the team goals of all other managers (Goal Plan Permission).

 How do you handle the process of changing manager.

Regards

Nicole

Best Regards

entry.title: Filtering of RAP Business Events in SAP BTP ABAP Environment and in SAP Advanced Event Mesh
entry.content:
In this blog post, I show you how you can do source side filtering of events in SAP BTP ABAP environment, what Dynamic Topics are and how we can use them for routing and filtering of events in SAP Integration Suite advanced Event Mesh.
Here, I represent two different ways of filtering of RAP business events in SAP BTP ABAP environment. On the left-hand side, you can see the SAP BTP ABAP environment system that produces some RAP business events. These events are then sent as CloudEvents to the right-hand side, to the Advanced Event Mesh instance.

In the first Part, we discuss Source Side Filtering of events which is available from release 2402 in SAP S/4HANA Cloud and SAP BTP ABAP environment and in SAP S/4HANA and SAP S/4HANA  Cloud, Private Edition since release 2023 SP00. For a RAP business event, then you can define filterable properties from the actual payload of that event. This means, if there's a field called for example “country code”, you can make it filterable by exposing it as CloudEvents context attribute. Then you can define filter conditions as well, like the country code must match the amount US or DE.  If this filter condition is not met, then the event is not sent out of the system. If you want to prevent some events to go out due to the data privacy protection issues or reduce traffic due to unnecessary events, then you can use event filtering.

 In the second part, we discuss Dynamic Topic Filtering and routing of  events with the integration with the Advanced Event Mesh. As a further remark, this feature is available from release 2408 in SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition and SAP BTP ABAP environment and in SAP S/4HANA and SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Private Edition since release 2023 SP02.

Source side filtering of RAP business events

Assume you are in your BTP ABAP environment system, and you have a RAP business event. This RAP business event has a corresponding abstract entity where you define your actual payload. Let's say you have a payload that contains a field “country code”:

This is a payload of a RAP business event without predefined filters. In the data part, the country code has the value DE and in the upper part you can see the header fields of the CloudEvent.
You want to know how you can make this property filterable? quite easy! As you define the event, you need to add the annotation “@Event.context.attribute” before the field you want to use as a filter and then give it a name like “xsapcountrycode” for example:

.context. attribute:'xsapcountrycode'
  CountryCode: abap.char(2);

Then, during the runtime, the country code value “DE” is exposed inside the Cloud Event Context as an additional attribute with the name you have defined as the value of the annotation explained above:

With that the payload field ‘Country Code’ becomes a new filter attribute.  the source side filtering is available for every event infrastructure that we curreHowever, there are some restrictions which must be considered, for example not all properties are allowed for exposing in header, e.g., amount fields or cf. annotation, more information can be found in 

Maintain Filters for Outbound Event Topics | SAP Help PortalEvent Annotations | SAP Help Portal.

 This SAP Note describes in more detail what must be considered when creating filters and which restrictions apply.

The next step would be going to filter configuration UI and there you can select all the filterable fields like xsapcountrycode and define filter conditions like ‘eq ‘DE’ ’. You can also define filters containing multiple fields and add additional filter conditions for those fields.

 Let’s look at the runtime, for example if you have an event with country code “DE”, this would be published because it would match the filter condition we already defined. Whereas if you have an event with country code “US”, this does not match the filter condition and would therefore be filtered out. This means if you want to prevent events from going out, for example due to data privacy protection or any other reason, then you can define corresponding filter conditions.

Define source side filters in your application

I already build a very simple application, an online shop as it is described in this tutorial. I added the field country code as well to use it later as a filter, so when I create a new item, I can assign a country code for the country I want to ship the item to.

 Now, we want to make sure that only events created for  items that are shipped to “DE” are also published to the event exchange infrastructure . I create the event that should be raised whenever an item is created and the parameter or the fields that should be in this event are defined in this abstract entity and it looks like this:

@EndUserText.label: 'Event parameter'
define abstract entity ZD_ItemOrdered_0000 {
    ItemName : abap.char(25);
@Event.context. attribute:'xsapcountrycode'
  CountryCode: abap.char(2);
}

To make this event filterable, I just add this simple annotation “@Event.context.attribute” and I call it xsapcountrycode. when I activate this entity, for all events that are raised inthis system, the field “CountryCode” is propagated into the Cloud Event context and contains the values that is in the payload. As a next step, we must define the filter criteria for the given event channel as well. 

After creating your communication arrangement, go to “Configure Channel Binding” application to configure the related channel and add your outbound topic which is created during event binding creation as is explained in the tutorial.  As you see, there is no event filters defined yet. Keep in mind that you can only add filters to existing outbound bindings.

You can see here we have an outbound topic which is the event from the application. Now I want to define the filter. You can create filters on each topic individually by clicking on it. Then in event filter tab, click on ‘create’ and choose the filter property. By clicking on “Create” the filter will be generated successfully.  All defined filters are displayed under Event Filter Expression.

We can head back to the channel and see that there is event filters configured:

Now let’s try to see if the filter works properly. For that, we will use our event monitor application which is a tool where you can monitor the status of your in/outbound events. First, you can see there are no events on this channel, we want to change that now.

 I go into my Fiori application and press “create” to create an order, a laptop for example, and I want to send that to Germany (DE). If you remember, this will match our filter criteria and therefore it would be sent out. An event can be monitored as expected, in the launchpad open the application “Enterprise Event Enablement-Event Monitor”, you can see an event reach your channel:

If we look at the payload, we see the country code “DE” in the header as well

Now to check if this filter works, I want to create another object in here, let's say I want to ship a tablet to Spain. I create this order and head back to our Event Monitor application. You can see the number of events hasn't changed, so the event with country code “ES” did not match our filter criteria and therefore was filtered.   Note that you cannot monitor or log events that are filtered out. Such event behaves as if the event was never raised!

Dynamic topic filtering in Advanced Event Mesh

Dynamic topics enable detailed event filtering and routing, ensuring that events are delivered only to the relevant components, improving efficiency and reducing unnecessary processing The feature of Dynamic Topics is only available for channels integratingwith the Advanced Event Mesh (AEM) . For more information regarding AEM, please follow Get Started with SAP Integration Suite, Advanced Event Mesh.

agine you have your RAP business event in BTP ABAP environment system, with the same abstract entity, that represents the actual event payload with the country code field. Similarly, you must add an additional annotation to enable Dynamic Topic or to enable that the country code is added as an additional segment to the Dynamic Topic. The first part of the annotation is the same; we have the event context attribute and then we give it a name, and additionally you also need to define a position. This is because you could have multiple Dynamic Topic segments, and we need to know at which position each one should be put, so you can order them in the way you need them.

.context:{attribute:'xsapcountrycode',position: 1}
  CountryCode: abap.char(2);

As you see below, the country code is exposed to the header part, but the difference is, you can see at the end of the standard topic the value of the country code field is added as well. Since you could define multiple properties, the position is so important to be added to the Dynamic Topic because we need to know at which position after the standard topic, the Dynamic Topic segment for the given property should be added

Besides, we want to use this field for routing and filtering the events in Advanced Event Mesh and for that, you also need to know the exact location of the specific property you want to use as a filter.

This is already everything you must do in BTP ABAP environment for your Rap business event. . Assume you want to have two filters, one for the country code “DE” and the other one for the country code “US”. For that, you must define two queues in your Advanced Event Mesh.

Let's say for example in the “US” queue you only want to have events of the country code “US”. Then, you define this topic subscription accordingly and you need to do the same thing for the second queue where you want to receive the events with the country code “DE”.

Now I will show you how to route your events in practice.  I have reverted all the changes I've made to enable source side filtering, so there is no event filters defined. Now we want to send out all the events and then put them into different queues depending on their properties. As it is explained before this is how our abstract entity must look like

@EndUserText.label: 'Event parameter'
define abstract entity ZD_ItemOrdered_0000 {
    ItemName : abap.char(25);
@Event.context:{attribute:'xsapcountrycode',position: 1}
  CountryCode: abap.char(2);
}

Create a channel for the integration with AEM, either by using the SAP GUI transaction in S/4HANA or SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Private Edition or respective communication arrangements in SAP S/4HANA Cloud , Public Edition or SAP BTP ABAP Environment (as described Get Started with SAP Integration Suite, Advanced Event Mesh).  You can enable Dynamic Topics by using the button “Enable Dynamic Topics” which is only enabled for Advanced Event Mesh channels. By clicking on this button and enabling the Dynamic Topics, you can see that something has changed, namely the topic now contains this Dynamic Topic segment “xsapcountrycode”:

Now I go to the connected Advanced Event Mesh broker and configure two queues, one for country code “DE” and another one for “US”:

In subscriptions section of “DE” queue for example, you can see the topic we have for “DE” country code

and for the “US” it's comparable. That's everything that needs to be done to route events.

 Let's create a new order to be shipped to “US”.  Then in our event monitor app, there is an event here and you can see also the outbound event tab has changed to signify this topic schema, so you know there are Dynamic Topics in place.

If we look at this event, we can see the Dynamic Topic segment is indeed “US” and if we check the payload, it's the same as before, we have our xsapcountrycode which is lifted to the header and the country code in there:

Now let's look at our queues and you can see one message has reached the US queue:

With that, you have a simple but powerful routing tool for your events.

Summary

Here I shortly presented the newly developed possibilities of event filtering and routing for SAP ABAP Cloud. Source side filtering prevents events from being published  based on the filters we define using the payload fields which are exposed to the Cloud Eventn context. This can be used to satisfy data privacy and protection restrictions or also in case you wanted to distribute the load among different connections.  By means of the Dynamic Topic feature we are now able to route and filter the events in Advanced Event Mesh broker. Both features are already available in the current SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition, SAP S/4HANA,  SAP S/4 HANA  Cloud Private  Edition as well as SAP BTP ABAP environment releases.

In the near future, the customer should also able to choose any valid payload fields of the given RAP event type as an event filter attribute without using annotation “@Event.context.attribute”.  Please follow the community page to get informed regarding updates in Enterprise Event Enablement content.

entry.title: Authorization Issue with PCOE Dashboard Access
entry.content:
Dear Support,

Good day!

I am currently facing an authorization issue when trying to access the PCOE Dashboard, despite having been assigned full authorization.

Looking forward to your assistance.

Best regards,


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Authorization Issue with PCOE Dashboard Access
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

Your S-User is missing an authorization named

"Service Reports (Partner)"

Since this is a partner authorization, it needs to be handled either by your company's Partner User Administrator, or SAP Partner Support. 

Kindly refer to the following KBA for more information:

3047087 Getting an authorization error in the SAP Partner CoE Quality Measurement Reporting dashboard - SAP Partner Portal

Kind regards,

Szilvia 

SAP Support

entry.title: Re: Standard Prepayment process in SAP ERP 6.0
entry.content:
Hi Lakshmipathi,

Thank you for sharing the note. However, my original question hasn't been answered. I created a sales order and saved it in the system, but I noticed that the pricing condition types AZWA, AZWB, and AZDI are appearing with zero value in sales order . I then tried to create a down payment request invoice (invoice type FAZ) and observed that the condition types (AZWA, AZWB) were not displayed and AZDI only displayed with zero value.

The FICO team used transaction code F-29 to clear the accounting document for the above down payment invoice.

Then I proceeded to remove the delivery block from sales order and create the delivery and final invoice (F2). Once again, the pricing condition types AZWA, AZWB, and AZDI were displayed with zero value.

Above attached screenshot for your reference.

entry.title: Re: System warning on SAPGUI Logon
entry.content: use t-code SM02

entry.title: RAP side effects not working after action on ITEM i need to update the HEADER and Associtations
entry.content:
Hi all,
I'm creating a RAP application — to simplify things, it's a Delivery App.
My root entity is the Delivery (so I can create and update deliveries), and the items are Sales Orders (which I won’t create, just associate).

I have a Delivery header with:

  • An association [0..*] to SALES_ORDERS on delivery = delivery

  • An association [0..*] to SALES_ORDERS_Without_Delivery on delivery = null

    On Frontend I have a header and two tables:
    Assigned Sales Orders and Unassigned Sales Orders.

    I want to implement a custom action to assign a delivery to selected unassigned sales orders.
    After the assignment, the frontend should remove the entries from SALES_ORDERS_Without_Delivery and add them to SALES_ORDERS.

     

    ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

    1. First attempt using an association:
      I defined an association [0..*] to SALES_ORDERS_Without_Delivery where delivery = null.

      I was able to display the table on the Object Page, but I couldn’t create any actions for it because this is not a composition.
      Since it's only an association, I can’t define actions for it in the behavior definition.

      Is it possible to create custom actions on the Object Page for a table that is only an association (not a composition)?

      2. Attempt: Create composition for SALES_ORDERS_Without_Delivery

      I managed to create a view that joins the selected Delivery with all Sales Orders that don’t have a delivery assigned.
      Based on this view, I was able to define a composition:

      composition [0..*] of ZSALES_ORDERS_Without_Delivery as _SALES_ORDERS_Without_Delivery

      Now, I can display the table and I'm able to create a custom inline action.
      When I click the action, I perform a simple database update:

      UPDATE Sales_orderDB SET Delivery = root-delivery WHERE sales_order = key-sales_order.

      This works fine, but after the update, I would like to refresh my first association (Delivery.SALES_ORDERS).
      I already defined side effects, but the UI is not refreshing as expected.

      action newLinkTodelivery;

      side effects { action newLinkTodelivery affects entity _Delivery;}

      What i can see on console is after updating the DB with the Delivery, this line is not anymore part of this composition,  my ACTION POST is working, after that i can see a GET on consolde but it returns 404 because that line doesnt exists . and also my side effects are not working.  Does anyone have an idea how to make it works?

      im also open to listen another approachs to achieve this app on RAP where i have the Header and i need to LINK the items.

       

       

       

       

       

       

       

  •

entry.title: Re: Eclipse ADT Version 2025-03 (4.35.0) crashes *continu...
entry.content:
This is most probably due to the following WebKit bug:

WebKit bug: https://bugs.webkit.org/show_bug.cgi?id=290985
Eclipse issue: https://github.com/eclipse-platform/eclipse.platform.swt/issues/1978

As already written in the Eclipse discussion: Our primary macOS team at SAP has filed an incident with Apple regarding this issue. We received feedback from them that they are currently working on a solution.

If you want to avoid that your colleagues get the same issue then the recommendation would be to avoid the MacOS update until this is fixed. Even though it seems not everyone with the affected MacOS version experiences the issue.

Unfortunately we have no workaround or solution from ADT side. The mentioned workaround in the Eclipse bug tracker (switch off 'combined hover') only works for Java development, not for ABAP development.

We are aware that this is a big problem for some ADT users. Please excuse the inconvenience.

Best regards,
Armin

entry.title: Your Guide to the Financial Management Track – Sapphire Orlando 2025!
entry.content:
Finance leaders, mark your calendars! SAP Sapphire & ASUG Annual Conference Orlando (May 19 – 21, 2025) is set to be a pivotal event for those aiming to revolutionize their financial operations. In today's rapidly evolving business landscape, finance functions are at the forefront of driving strategic decisions. SAP Sapphire 2025 provides a unique platform to explore how integrating AI, data analytics, and cloud technologies can transform financial operations, ensuring resilience and competitiveness.

Top Financial Management Sessions to Attend at SAP Sapphire & ASUG Annual Conference 2025 in Orlando

Whether you're managing uncertainty, navigating transformation, or enabling compliance and sustainability, this year's Financial Management Track will equip you with the knowledge, tools, and inspiration to lead change. Visit this page to explore the sessions, build your personalized agenda, and discover content tailored to your role.

🌟Spotlight Sessions

Gain powerful insights into driving business and finance transformation in these key sessions:

  • Finance Transformation with SAP Business Suite (Onsite: FIM3233) (Recording: FIM3233v)
    Learn how integrated applications, real-time data, and AI unlock new opportunities to optimize working capital, improve planning accuracy, and ensure compliance—automatically at DHL Information Services.
  • Transformation finance and spend through applications, data & AI (Onsite: FIM3235) (LIVE and Recording – FIM3235v)
    Hear from Johnson & Johnson how they’re leveraging SAP Business Suite to stay ahead in a rapidly evolving landscape.

🛣️ Roadmap and Solution Overviews

Gain foresight into SAP's vision for finance:

  • From vision to reality: Laser-focused innovations transforming finance (FIM2199)
  • Harness Growth & Transformation with AI & Insights in Opportunity to Cash (FIM2253)
  • Unlock the future of cash management with AI-driven optimization (FIM2196)
  • Next-generation, AI-powered cash visibility and instant payments (FIM2198)
  • Transforming finance with SAP Business Suite (ERP3264)
  • Sustainable finance: From regulatory compliance to carbon accounting (SUS2331)
  • Accelerate planning with data integration across your organization (BDC2779)

🎯Strategy Talks

Discover bold strategies shaping finance’s future:

  • Empower your finance function with SAP Business Suite (ERP3267)
  • Drive your service-centric growth with SAP Business Suite (ERP3331)
  • Achieve bold spend goals with agenetic AI and harmonized data from SAP (SPM2498)
  • Extended planning and analysis (xP&A) for SAP Analytics Cloud – (BDC2781)
  • Navigate the path to autonomous finance with SAP Business Suite and SAP BTP (BTP2075)
  • OGE: Raising finance and HR efficiency with SAP Build and SAP S/4HANA Cloud (BTP2099)
  • Connect HR, finance, and the rest of your business with SAP Business Suite (HCM1640)
  • SAP goes SaaS: Transforming Quote-to-Cash in high-tech (DIS2508)

🏆Customer Success Sessions

Real customers. Real results. Learn how leading organizations are transforming finance:

  • Learn about the Carbon accounting from an auditor’s perspective (FIM2200)
  • Rethink how you run tax compliance and comply with new regulations – (FIM2201)
  • Speed transformation with SAP Billing and Revenue Innovation Management (FIM2202)
  • Finance Transformation with SAP EPM: The Standard Chartered Bank Example (FIM2203)
  • Manage subscriptions with SAP Billing and Revenue Innovation Management (FIM2722)
  • Harnessing Data for cost-effective decarbonization and sustainable growth (FIM2723)
  • Streamline compliance with an intelligent sustainability data strategy (SUS2322)
  • How Delek streamlined financial planning for real-time insights (BDC3259)
  • Connecting people, data, and processes with SAP Business Suite (HCM1641)

🧪 Demo Stations

Experience our financial management solutions in action:

  • Core finance, trade, and compliance management (FIM2567)
  • Quote to Cash for Business Innovation (FIM2568)
  • Treasury, working capital, and SAP Taulia (FIM2569)

Dive into our financial management demos at the CloudERP, Business AI, BDC, Sustainability, CS&D, BTP, and HCM demo stations!

🤝Partner-led sessions
Get to hear from our partners directly: 

  • Financial operations excellence at Delta with BlackLine and SAP Solutions – (PAR1112)
  • From complexity to clarity: Bausch + Lomb’s financial transformation (PAR1195)
  • Magnera’s financial reporting journey: Group reporting (PAR1180)
  • Nielsen's billing and revenue transformation (PAR1104)
  • Modernizing at Bell Canada without missing a beat with IBM Rapid Move (PAR1150)
  • Streamlining financial close and reporting for accuracy and efficiency (PAR1154)

💼CFO Show Floor Tours

Join a guided tour to explore how SAP empowers finance leaders to steer working capital, drive transformation, ensure compliance, and unlock innovation through AI, predictive forecasting, subscription billing, and more.

👩‍💼CFO Roundtable

Discover how the latest advancements in AI, machine learning, and SAP solutions are empowering CFOs to optimize liquidity, navigate global disruptions, and drive profitable growth — all while reducing risk and cost during this CFO roundtable discussion.

💻SAP Sapphire Virtual

For the first-time ever, a dedicated Financial Management session and a demo will be LIVE at Virtual Sapphire (May 19 – 21, 2025). More details to follow!

🚀Rocket-launch into the future of financial management

This isn’t just a conference — it’s your launchpad to financial leadership. Whether you’re steering digital transformation, exploring autonomous finance, or unlocking new revenue streams, the Financial Management Track will inspire action and spark innovation.

👉Visit the SAP Sapphire 2025 Homepage
👉Build your own agenda using the Financial Management Track Catalog
👉Discover SAP Finance and Risk Management Solutions on SAP.com

entry.title: Re: Optimized Story - Pages vs. TabStrip Widget
entry.content: I am curious to know the answer to this too. I am finding that a tabstrip provides a more seamless user experience than multiple pages. It just looks and feels better and it also help in avoiding having to copy say a header section across multiple pages.

Helloo Expert,

As previously we are using ECC then migrate to SAP Public Cloud Grow,

please help guide me how to setup the process if there any different treatement..

during the implementation  i cannot find the information that relate.

what should i check first to start setup ?

 

Please your help will really appreciated.

Thank You

entry.title: Re: Datasphere Graphical View Filter WHERE IN
entry.content:
There is no direct equivalent to WHERE Field_1 NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT FIELD_11 FROM ATABLE) in graphical view

The workaround is:

  1. Create a LEFT JOIN between your tables (YourTable.Field_1 = ATABLE.FIELD_11)
  2. Filter for NULL values in the joined table column (WHERE ATABLE.FIELD_11 IS NULL)

This produces the same results as NOT IN in most cases. Performance is actually often better with the LEFT JOIN approach than with NOT IN, especially for larger datasets.

Choosing SQL View in that case can be a good option - if you see that the logic will be simpler that way.

entry.title: BRF+ in SAP MDG: Unable to get BP Central Data fields while adding condition in validation rule.
entry.content:
Hi,

I am configuring a Validation using BRF+ in SAP MDG for the Business Partner (BP) data model.

I am using the standard function CHECK_BP_CENTRL under the application FMDM_MODEL_BP for validations. However, while trying to define a rule condition, I’m unable to find the Central Data fields in the context (but Change Request Type is available).

What I’ve done:

  • Created a Rule Set and Rule under Check Entity for BP.

  • Assigned the function CHECK_BP_CENTRL.

  • When trying to define a condition by creating a rule under Assigned Ruleset, I opened the Context Query, but Central data fields of BP are not available.

Screenshot attached for clarity. 

 

How can I make sure that the BP Central Data fields are available in the BRF+ context? 

Any documentation links, screenshots, or guidance from your experience would be very helpful.

Thanks in advance for your support!

entry.content: Test accounts are affected. I'm having the same problem.

entry.title: SAP Sales Cloud Version 2 Escalation Process
entry.content:
Hello Experts

In SAP Sales Cloud Version 2, I would like to set up an automatic escalation process. If a lead is assigned to an employee but no call or activity is logged within 24 hours, I want a notification to be sent to the employee’s manager.

What is the best way to configure this scenario using autoflow conditions or other tools in SAP Sales Cloud V2?

entry.title: Re: Consume SAP BTP Document Information Extraction service for custom documents in ABAP
entry.content: Hi - Please can you send over the code.

entry.title: Rebate to Payer capped on a Ship-to Customer
entry.content:
Hi All,

We have a requirement where the rebate is to be paid to the payer of the sales documents but the rebate paid needs to be capped per Ship-to party.

Example: Cap is 2000 $

Sales Orders for Ship-to party A, Payer C --> 3000 $ (Cap is reached, so 2000 $ needs to be paid)

Sales Orders for Ship-to party B ,Payer C---> 1500 $ (Cap is not reached , so 1500 $ needs to be paid)

Rebate needs to be paid to Payer C  --> Total Rebate is  2000 $ + 1500 $ = 3500 $

Is there any way that this is possible in standard.

Thanks,

Priya

entry.title: New customer story from Westwood
entry.content:
It's always great to hear how customers are using the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition with the integrated product compliance solution to enable them to automate product safety workflows and help support international business growth.

See the full Westwood story here.

See Westwood's story!

entry.title: Re: SAP Tech Bytes: Using the SAP Approuter at dev time - a full-stack journey with UI5 and SAP CAP
entry.content:
Hi @ahmetdik1,

probably too late now, but after some more digging I found a way to force CAP to use XSUAA when started in hybrid mode through the dev-approuter: https://github.com/SAP-samples/sap-tech-bytes/blob/cloud-foundry-basics/post6/packages/cap-server/srv/server.js

It's not pretty by any means, but it works. And since it's a dev time thing, I guess that's ok.

Please refer to this repo for the comprehensive sample.

Best, Nico

entry.title: Re: Preview/Print of a Document (Crystal Report) not working
entry.content:
Hallo Matija,

it happens every time. It also happens if i click on Advanced if i am in the Report and Layout Manager, select the report and i click on advanced.



I have installed the last 64 Bit and 32 Bit ODBC Driver.

The version i am using is 2502.

There is no UDT used in the Report itself, but there are some UDO/UDT's in the Database.

Best regards
Andy

But "/images/v2/search" API is failing with 401 Unauthorized error and message: Failed to get org and user

All other APIs from SAP AI Toolkit are working fine with same Bearer token.

entry.title: I have all correct entry maintained in MM50 but still the same message as no materials selected

entry.title: FIORI Issue - Table /IWBEP/I_MGW_SRH is not getting updated from backend
entry.content:
Hi Gurus, 

We are trying to find the last changed date of the OData Services for the Audit. Just to set up a context for the question - We are trying to find out if a specific "Report" in Fiori is a Standard / Customized Report. So, for example - if we have a "Aged Debtors Report" which is basically the FBL5N report, in Fiori, and if we are extracting the same from FIORI, and if we are to prove that the report has not been meddled with, we would have to check the OData Services. 

So, now what I am trying to understand is, for the tile as per this example - "Aged Debtors Report", we need to find out the OData Services (v4 and v2), and then through /UI2/FLPCM_CUST, we are finding out the OData services, and then we are viewing the services - find out the External Service Name. 

Now, once I find out the External Service Name, I will query the table /IWFND/I_MED_SRH and /IWBEP/I_MGW_SRH to find out the Data Provider Class and the last changed dates of the class, and who has changed it. That will give me the idea if the "Tile" is a standard tile or a customized tile. 

I need an help in understanding if the above methodology is correct. 

I also need a help with the below screenshot from /IWBEP/I_MGW_SRH table, where the Changed By / Changed_timestmp field is empty, but in the backend transaction i.e. /IWFND/MAINT_SERVICE is populated for this field. 

Could you help me understand / solve the above 2 Questions. Also, another context is, this is for an Audit that we are doing.

entry.title: Re: How to deploy a UI5 app inside a CAP MTA project and make it available from SAP Build Work Zone,
entry.content:
Amazing blog @MioYasutake !

I was trying setting up this architecture without BAS directly in VS Code and failed every time because the template generater did not provide all the options like the one in BAS does.

Following you're blog really helped me out and it worked on the first try.

Thank you so much & have a nice day 😀

entry.title: Re: FSCM CM: How transaction date in SD objects
entry.content: Does this note also refer to the transaction date calculation for sales orders? I mean the history of payments could impact the calculation of transaction date for sales order too? Is there same customize to disregard payment history and always consider the shipping/billing date? As we can do to fill the planning date (fdtag) in finance documents?

entry.title: Re: How to export and import SOLMAN process management
entry.content: Hi! When importing monitors, we specify a new group of logical components. There are no problems with this. But for some types of monitors (tRFC, qRFC, IDOC), the source and target systems specified when creating monitors of these types are not automatically replaced. Is it possible to replace them in some way or only by editing json?

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to edit but not post supplier invoice...
entry.content:
Hello, 

Yes, when you are in the App "Supplier invoice List ", select the relevant invoice and go to Edit.

 

You can then make the Alterations/adjustments and then go to Park. The invoice is parked for the time being and not posted.

Best regards 

Dennis

entry.title: Unable to execute Goods Issue due to Credit Card Authorization
entry.content:
• In SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, when executing goods issue for a sales order with multiple delivery plants, a credit block error is encountered.
  • WHY does the credit card authorization 'expires' or becomes unusable after it has been partially billed?
  • How to re-authorize the orders?

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: SAP IAS Federated Access AWS Cognito
entry.content:
Hi Diego,

What is your current setup? Do you have IAS today or is build workzone directly talking with your idp? Where is the third party app hosted? in BTP?

I believe the steps should be the same to establish trust between Build workzone, IAS and any Idp.

Thank you.

Julius

entry.title: Re: Unable to execute Goods Issue due to Credit Card Auth...
entry.content:
This is the current behavior of Sales Order processing. The first delivery that result in the partial Billing will take the complete authorization. SD provides a recurring job Resolve Payment Card Issues - Reauthorizations that automatically requests new authorizations for the remaining value of the sales order.

Refer, Authorization of Payment Cards

Also, refer Resolve_Payment_Card_Issues_Reauthorization

The details are provided in SAP KBA https://me.sap.com/notes/3599044 

 

Regards,

SAP Support

entry.title: Re: SAP Tech Bytes: Using the SAP Approuter at dev time - a full-stack journey with UI5 and SAP CAP
entry.content:
Hi @nicoschoenteich 

Really appreciated your interest and reply despite it's kinda late. I'll take a look as soon as possible and will share the test result.

entry.title: Re: Conditionally send a standard event from SAP S/4HANA...
entry.content:
Hi SumitKundu,

(I think I accidentally "accepted" your reply, so I cannot reply directly ... hope you still receive this.)

To answer your questions: Well, yes. What we have in S/4HANA is outbound filtering. You can filter on data from the payload; this requires (at this point in time) that you extend the event with context parameters. There is a tutorial available:

https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/abap-environment-maintain-filters-outbound-events.html

You can mix that with a derived event to add to the payload whatever you want to filter on - if it is somewhere stored on the database (or rather: accessible through some - released - view). So a change would be hard to filter on, but a simple "SalesOrderType = 1000" is possible.

entry.title: Re: SAP CIS - User shows undefined when authentication to...
entry.content:
Hi

The most common issue would be an incorrect mapping of attributes from entraID. The login itself might be successful but the user created in BTP subaccount (shadow user creation enabled) might be a random number of characters (using some OIDC 'sid' attribute or similar) without name, lastname and other attributes

I would have a look at the shadow user created in BTP subaccount and understand how the user is created. if you're not using identity federation you need to make sure to pass the atributes from your corporate IDP in the app configuration. make sure the atributes match with the ones from your corp IDP. Also in IAS, have a look at the "troubleshooting logs" to understand how OIDC token is generated and the attributes used.

Diego

entry.title: Re: Extension Ledger and Foreign Currency Valuation
entry.content:
Hi Swaminathan sir

Very helpful.  Thanks for the information.

 

Regards,

Raja

entry.title: Re: Want to merge transaction line in SAC model based on...
entry.content:
1. collect all value to new DIM C value MP from original value same measure,
  2. as part of step 1, collect a count with virtual measure member. 
  3. devide total value by count on MP 
  4. delete value on MP1, MP2, MP3.

entry.title: TARGET and SOURCE are not replaced for qRFC, tRFC, IDOC monitors when importing json
entry.content:
Hello SAP-Community.

We are testing the mass transfer of monitors from one LCG to another LCG. For upgrading to S/4HANA. We create a scope and upload it to a json file. There are no problems for ABAP monitors and table entry counter. But for tRFC, qRFC, IDOC monitors, the SOURCE and TARGET systems specified when creating monitors of these types are not automatically replaced. Is it possible to replace them in some way or only through editing json?

entry.title: Re: Your System is Upgraded to Release 2502 – Now What?
entry.content: Is this or something similar available for private cloud?

entry.title: Re: SE71 Graphical Form Painter Error after SAP GUI 800 P...
entry.content: i have install SCRLTESP80003_3-80008266 file and my issue has been resolved.

entry.title: Re: Request for Solution – Assigning Assets to Employees in SAP Public Cloud
entry.content: did you find the answer ? I have same scenario. We will migrate to Public cloud in few months

Hi SAP Team,

Our Business User required Supplier Rating App according to Delivery Schedule, Shortage & Product Quality.

Please suggest the standard app or any solution to achieve this functionality. 

 

Thanks & Regards,

Shalu Verma

entry.title: Re: Account 'KTNAFB : Acc.Dep. Accnt.for Ordinary Dep' co...
entry.content:
Hi Ajay,

To solve this Error in the T-code AO90 under XXX Chart of accounts -->>>  XXX Account determination -->>> Depreciation -->>> Here you will see your Dep areas XX nnnnnnn,

Assign the G/L.

entry.title: Re: @sap/datasphere-cli: Getting Rid of Passcodes Thanks to OAuth Client Support
entry.content:
Hello @jascha_meiswinkel ,
We're trying to use the CLI, after installing node,js and npm package, we gave the datasphere login command, it asked for the host, client ID and client secret, we gave those as well. 
After that a window pops up with link http://localhost:8080/?code=xxxxx and message 'Thank you, you can close this window now.' but then we're just getting the error 'Failed to log in to your account using interactive OAuth authentication' in CMD. 

How can we fix this issue?

entry.title: Re: Sneak Peek in to SAP Analytics Cloud release for Q2 2025
entry.content:
Hi Orla, 

Thanks for the update! In the Analytical insights in Joule topic it says: 

  • Support for SAP Datasphere models when SAP Dataphere and SAP Analytics Cloud tenants are part of a SAP Business Data Cloud formation

What exactly does this mean? Are these the completely new SAC/DSP environments that will be created from within the BDC offering? Does this mean that all current SAC/DSP tenants are excluded? 

Cheers,
Xavier

entry.title: Re: @sap/datasphere-cli: Getting Rid of Passcodes Thanks to OAuth Client Support
entry.content:
Hi @Yash02 

you can add option --verbose to the command to better understand what is going wrong. Also, you can set the LOG_LEVEL env variable to 6 to receive a full debug log (see https://www.npmjs.com/package/@sap/datasphere-cli?activeTab=readme#log_level). 

Feel free to share the log with me via e-mail so I can help you better. 

Also, check the troubleshooting guide at https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/faq-amp-troubleshooting-guide-for-sap-datasphere-cli/ba-p/13550029 for a solution which might address your specific issue.

Thank you & looking forward to your feedback!

Jascha

entry.title: Merging Users in IAS
entry.content:
Are there any tips/techniques to merge users/security groups from 2 different source systems in IAS?

The Source Systems each contain specific information regarding access for the user.

When a sync is triggered, all of the existing security groups are cleared and only the security group for the current source system being synched are added back. Ideally, the sync will only clear/add security groups tied to the system being synched.

entry.title: LRN-167172-1H 2025 Product Release
entry.content:
With the new delta update 1H-2025 we are facing below issue in our preview instance-

Issue-

  • Needs attention option showing for even empty courses
  • Course data visible in legacy view however in new ILX view it’s not visible.
  • Failed to load data is adding confusion in new ILX view as there is no course assigned in legacy view
  • PFA screenshot for referenced
  • Reference url- https://hcm4preview.sapsf.com/login?company=halliburtoT1
